summary: Retest after main-agent fix (added FailedAttempts to GET /api/orders/{id} and admin orders List projection). Admin UI duplicate-button gating now fully correct end-to-end. All three admin scenarios pass, driver deliveries list loads, pharmacy dashboard + /Pharmacy/Reports load cleanly with zero JS errors. Bug #1 UI regression from iteration_15 is RESOLVED.

issues: Uses the browser's native date input (mm/dd/yyyy) instead of a shadcn/calendar component. Cosmetic only, not blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: Fix verified in /app/rxexpresss-solution/RxExpresss.API/Controllers/OrdersController.cs: GET /api/orders/{id} now returns failedAttempts (value confirmed via curl: order 39->2, order 17->1, order 43->0).

Admin/Orders.cshtml L412 gate `o.status === 'failed' && canDuplicate && (o.failedAttempts||0) >= 2` now evaluates correctly — `canDuplicate` is a client-side permission check (ApiService.hasPermission('orders.duplicate')=true for admin) and `failedAttempts` is now populated from the response.
No other regressions observed. Driver portal, pharmacy dashboard, and pharmacy reports all render cleanly (0 console errors).

success_rate.backend: 100% (previous 6/6 still green, plus GET /api/orders/{id} schema fix verified via curl on 3 orders)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Admin 3/3 duplicate-button scenarios, Driver deliveries list, Pharmacy dashboard, Pharmacy reports)

seed_data_creation: Reused orders from iteration_15: order 39 (failed, failedAttempts=2), order 17 (failed, failedAttempts=1), order 43 (assigned, failedAttempts=0). No new seed data created this iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug #1 Admin duplicate-button UI fully resolved. All 4 bug fixes (Admin Duplicate gating, Copay-clear-on-failed, Driver attempt-failed flow, Backfill-gigs) are now green both in Python regression (/app/backend/tests/test_bug_fixes.py) and in Admin UI. Seeded orders retained: 17 (fail=1), 39/40/41 (fail=2), 43 (assigned). Minor design nit: /Pharmacy/Reports uses browser-default date picker — not a blocker.
rca of the issue: RESOLVED. Main agent extended the anonymous projection in OrdersController.Get() and List() to include o.FailedAttempts. Verified via 3 curl checks: /api/orders/39 returns failedAttempts=2, /api/orders/17 returns failedAttempts=1, /api/orders/43 returns failedAttempts=0. In admin UI Playwright test, [data-testid="duplicate-btn-39"] count=1 (visible, verified screenshot), duplicate-btn-17 count=0 (correctly hidden for 1-attempt failed order), duplicate-btn-43 count=0 (correctly hidden for non-failed order).
